The '''elix''' were rare predatory birds that hunted in flocks. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era, their [[Unidentified elix homeworld|homeworld]] was threatened by a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] explosion. In order to preserve the [[Species/Legends|species]], a population was established on the Imperial Species Preservation Zone [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dar'Or]]. There, the elix were even deadlier predators, as their new homeworld had much lower [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] than their old world did. The elix preyed on the native sentients, the [[Ri'Dar]]s.

Elix also attracted [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to Dar'Or, since their meat was prized by gourmets.
